emails.subject: FW: Physical Gas
emails.body: FW: Physical Gas John, Can you confirm whether or not you guys had planned to launch physical gas from day 1? Dave

emails.subject: RE: Physical Gas
emails.body: that was our plan but I am not sure whether UBS has the proper Canadian corporate structure to allow to do that yet

emails.subject: RE: Physical Gas
emails.body: John, I understand Peter Keohane is here today and through the weekend if necessary to complete contracts for Canada with UBS legal. I am hoping that completion of contracts includes identification of corporate entity (vain hope?) Dave
